meaning: n.低岬,角,前沿地,前陆(与内地相对而言)
examples: Foreland basins are the key areas for the study of orogeny.
Foreland basins are important areas of exploration for petroleum in China.
Simulation of plant root systems is a internal and overseas research foreland.
Cuspate foreland: an accretionary feature consisting of a triangular accumulation of sand projecting seawards from the shoreline.
Julian Baggini will spend a week based at South Foreland Lighthouse recording his observations in a blog.
